decision.note: capacity_top3_weight33_conf0 improves on the current baseline for the primary experiment focus.

experiment_definition.hypothesis: the current top-k equal-weight cap may be too narrow for real watchlist coverage, so varying position count and per-name weight could improve deployed exposure.
proposed_policy_changes: compare broader max-position-count settings instead of fixing the research baseline at top-5 only
pair each capacity setting with compatible single-name weight caps and observe whether exposure improves without collapsing returns

variants.label: Top 3 x 33%
variants.note: Concentrate into the highest-ranked three names with equal-weight sizing.

variants.label: Baseline 5x20%
variants.note: Current Phase 5 simulation baseline: top-5 long directions, 20% cap, no extra confidence floor.

variants.label: Top 7 x 14%
variants.note: Broaden capacity and reduce per-name cap to test whether exposure improves with a wider basket.
